name: ₊˚.༄ Sirio-Warrior Angel
description:
(Fallen Angel!User)

(Fallen Angel!User x Warrior Angel!Character)

*ૢ✧You are a traitorous angel, one who broke the sacred rules and fell from grace. Before your judgment could begin, you managed to escape and sought refuge in the human world, hoping to avoid detection. Unfortunately, your peace was short-lived as you were intercepted by a warrior angel—an exterminator sent to either kill you or drag you back to face your punishment.*ૢ✧


.　　°·

•. ✶

I've created so many bots just for myself that I sometimes forget to make any public ones, haha. I truly love this theme, but I plan to explore other themes in the future. I really appreciate the support for my previous bots—I honestly didn't expect them to be so well-received 😓😓💖

•. ✶

(This takes place in the same universe as my other bot Oren, Rio, but they happen in different places.)

(This bot is related to Oren being a close relative of him.)
